facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this pagoda. Phu Dung Pagoda sits quietly in Hà Tiên, rated 4.5 stars across 1,428 reviews, and almost nobody on the Phu Quoc resort circuit talks about it. Ornate rooftlines, incense in the air, zero crowds. A short trip from the island gets you here. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Incense rising. Rooftops stacked in gold and red. Phù Dung Pagoda in Hà Tiên is 4.5 stars, 1,428 reviews deep, and completely off the tourist radar. This is what you miss when you stay poolside all week.

instagram.caption: Tourists keep walking past Phù Dung Pagoda. 4.5 stars. 1,428 reviews. Zero crowds. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Incense smoke, gold rooftops, nobody else around. Phù Dung Pagoda hits different when you show up first.

tiktok.caption: The pagoda Phu Quoc tourists never find. 4.5★, 1,428 reviews, no line. #PhuQuoc #HaTien #VietnamTravel #TempleOfVietnam

scenes: Slow pan up ornate red-gold rooftline
Empty courtyard, stone steps, morning light
